title: APUSH Unit Overview SY2025-26
body: Full-year AP US History course map: 9 units from Colonial Era through Contemporary Period. Five sections, 28 students per section. DBQ and LEQ scaffolding resources linked in Unit 1.

title: BEU Eastbridge Chapter Home
body: Eastbridge High School BEU chapter home. David Russo, Building Rep. 42 members. Current priorities: 2026 contract campaign, class size reduction, and prep time protection.

title: Contract Campaign 2026 - Strategy Overview
body: 2026 BEU contract campaign strategy: member survey results (compensation #1, class size #2, prep time #3), mobilization calendar, action escalation plan, and communication templates.

title: Labor History Unit - Document Set Overview
body: Labor history unit covering 1870-1970. Primary source sets: Triangle Shirtwaist fire, Pullman Strike, ILGWU, CIO formation. DBQ prompt and sample student responses included.

title: Gettysburg 2026 Trip Logistics
body: May 14, 2026 Gettysburg field trip. 24 students, 2 chaperones. Reliable Coach Lines bus, 7am departure from Eastbridge. Itinerary: Devil Den, Little Round Top, Cyclorama. Student research assignment included.

title: Active Grievances - SY2025-26
body: Open grievances: (1) Excessive hall duty - Article 12 violation, filed May 28 2026, three teachers affected. (2) Unauthorized classroom observation - Article 8 violation, filed March 2026, resolved April 2026.

title: AP Exam FRQ Practice Bank
body: 20 FRQ practice prompts organized by APUSH period. Period 1-5 prompts focus on causation and comparison. Period 6-9 prompts emphasize continuity and change. Scoring rubrics attached.

title: Civil War Unit - Primary Source Redesign
body: Redesigned Civil War unit adding 6 new primary sources: Frederick Douglass speeches, contraband camp photographs, 54th Massachusetts letters, emancipation proclamation drafts.

title: New Member Welcome Packet
body: Welcome to BEU! This packet covers your rights under the collective bargaining agreement, how to reach your building rep, dues information, and the grievance process. Updated January 2026.

title: PD Hours Log SY2025-26
body: Professional development hours: 48 hours logged as of June 2026. Includes BEU workshops (8h), NEA webinars (10h), curriculum development (20h), and NSTA conference (10h).

title: WWI Primary Source Packet - Teacher Guide
body: Teacher guide for WWI primary source packet: 10 documents including Wilson Fourteen Points, anti-war posters, soldier letters, and Committee on Public Information propaganda. Discussion protocols included.

title: Reconstruction Unit - Lesson Plan Overview
body: New Reconstruction unit: 8 lessons covering freedmen experience, Radical Reconstruction, 14th and 15th Amendments, and Redeemer backlash. Primary sources from Freedmen's Bureau and Congressional record.

title: History Club 2025-26 Year Overview
body: History Club activities SY2025-26: Gettysburg trip (May 14), Concord visit (April 5), DC planning begun. Student membership 18 students. Monthly meetings in Room 214.

title: BEU Member Survey Results 2025
body: 42 Eastbridge members surveyed Oct 2025. Top priorities: compensation (38 votes), class size (31 votes), prep time (28 votes), safety (15 votes). Full analysis in appendix. Used to shape contract proposals.

title: Progressive Era Unit Update - Teacher Notes
body: Summer 2026 update adding Ida Tarbell Standard Oil muckraking articles and Upton Sinclair excerpts. New discussion prompts: How did muckraking journalism drive Progressive Era reform?

title: Canvas LMS Setup Guide SY2025-26
body: Guide for AP US History Canvas modules: assignment rubric upload, discussion forum setup, grade passback configuration, and student view testing. Updated for BPS Canvas 4.0.

title: BEU Newsletter June 2026 Draft
body: June 2026 draft: Lead article on contract campaign status, member spotlight on Kevin Monteiro, fall calendar preview, and reminder about BEU summer institute. Due to printer June 20.

title: Student Research Paper Guidelines
body: Independent research paper guidelines: topic selection criteria, approved databases, MLA citation format, draft submission schedule, and final paper rubric. 22 students enrolled Spring 2026.

title: Position Cut Fight 2024 - Campaign Archive
body: Archive of the successful 2024 campaign to restore 3 history department positions. Documentation: initial cut announcement, member mobilization actions, school committee testimony, final victory letter.

title: Hall Duty Grievance Documentation
body: Grievance filed May 28, 2026 re: Article 12 violation. Three Social Studies teachers assigned double hall duty since March without compensation. Documenting: assignment dates, contract language, and administrative communication.
